overview: CHANNELFORGE CRM is an enterprise-grade, sovereign channel-sales CRM and PRM platform for software Vendors, Distributors, and Resellers with deeply role-aware, operationally intelligent experiences for every user persona.
features: Linked workspace relationship views by org type
Full seeded dummy ecosystem for testing
Enterprise dark navy and orange design system
Quote builder and price list engine
Channel hierarchy governance (CAM, Channel Sales Manager, Channel Director)
